themes.label: Faith/Belief
themes.summary: This chapter emphasizes trust, belief, confidence, or steadfast reliance on God. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 26 verses. Commentary leans on "What "great wonders" has God performed in salvation history that strengthen your faith?".
